# 🛠️ ForgeBoard General Coding Standards

## Formatting
- Use Prettier (JS/TS) and gofmt (Go) for formatting.
- 2-space indentation for JS/TS, tabs for Go.

## Naming
- camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for classes/types.
- Clear, descriptive names; avoid abbreviations.

## Documentation
- JSDoc/GoDoc for all public APIs, modules, complex functions.
- Update docs with every code/API change.

## Security
- Never commit secrets/credentials.
- Follow OWASP and FedRAMP guidelines.

## Accessibility
- All UI must meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

## Visuals
- All new docs must include at least two infographics/diagrams (see Visual Standards).

---
